---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Essays, notes, and longer-form thinking"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note}
This section is a placeholder — add your essays and posts as `.qmd` files
in the `writing/` folder and list them here. Each file becomes a page
at `yourdomain.com/writing/filename.html`.
:::

## Essays {.section-heading}

::: {.post-list}

::: {.post-item}
<a href="#" class="post-title">What "Lyricism" Actually Means: A Measurement Problem</a>
<p class="post-meta">Coming soon · Data / Music</p>
<p class="post-excerpt">
  We started with a single number and ended up with five dimensions, a confidence
  flag system, and a 17-source bibliography. This is what the construct validity
  problem looks like in practice.
</p>
:::

::: {.post-item}
<a href="#" class="post-title">Your Second Essay Title</a>
<p class="post-meta">Coming soon · [Topic]</p>
<p class="post-excerpt">
  A short preview sentence or two about what the essay covers.
  Replace this placeholder when ready.
</p>
:::

:::

---

## Notes {.section-heading}

Short observations that don't deserve a full essay but are worth writing down.
Coming soon.
